questions.text: When we multiply both sides of an inequality by a negative number, the inequality sign reverses.
questions.explanation: When multiplying or dividing both sides of an inequality by a negative number, the inequality sign reverses.

questions.text: Represent x ≥ 3 on a number line.
questions.correctAnswer: A closed circle at 3 with arrow pointing to the right (towards positive infinity)
questions.explanation: For x ≥ 3, we use a closed circle (included) at 3 and shade all values to the right.
